## Checklist

- [ ] I read the relevant `AGENTS.md` instructions.
- [ ] I kept the change scoped to one feature, fix, or maintenance task.
- [ ] I added or updated focused tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs, generated templates, or harness state when needed.
- [ ] I ran `git diff --check`.
- [ ] I used signed-off commits for work intended for submission.
- [ ] I credited external prior art where this PR adapts another project.
- [ ] I can explain every meaningful AI-assisted change in this PR.
- [ ] This PR does not include secrets, private repository data, machine-local
  paths, or long raw command output.
